scene: A big balance scale. On the left side, a tall happy pile of glowing hearts and thumbs-up floats UP high. On the right side, a single thumbs-down drags its side all the way DOWN, heavily outweighing the whole pile. The lopsided scale is the bold idea. Flat bright doodle, centered. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A doodle stick figure lying in bed at night, eyes wide open and unable to sleep, a frowny speech bubble floating above its head replaying a rude comment. Flat muted blue night background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A simple cartoon brain on a tipping balance, a heavy red alarm arrow yanking it toward a glowing red THREAT side, while a faint little heart praise side floats ignored and grey. Flat bright doodle. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A doodle stick figure staring at a phone screen full of green positive message bubbles, but one bright red negative message pops forward and everything else fades to dull grey, the brain zooming in on the single bad one. Flat bright doodle. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A calm doodle stick figure with its brain drawn as a little friendly shield-and-alarm guardian standing watch beside it, protective not happy. Flat warm coral background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
